---
title: "Henrique Santos"
subtitle: "Translating how children grow into the stories they grow up with"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* This part works everywhere, even outside of R */
body {
  background-color: #f7f2e8 !important;
}

#title-block-header {
  text-align: center !important;
  padding-top: 15vh !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
}

.title {
  color: #1b4965 !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  font-size: 3.5rem !important;
}

.subtitle {
  font-weight: 300 !important;
  font-style: italic !important;
  color: #24292e !important;
  font-size: 1.5rem !important;
  margin-top: 15px !important;
}

.button-container {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 50px;
}
</style>

::: {.button-container}
<a href="research.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg" role="button">The Science Behind</a>
<a href="parents.qmd" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" role="button">From Screen to Living Room</a>
:::
